'''''Star Wars: Emissaries to Malastare''''' was the third story arc in the ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' series of [[Star Wars comic books|comic books]]. It consisted of issues 13-18 and was set in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].
